landing.headline: Your Bridge to
landing.subline: Discover government schemes you qualify for. File and track civic complaints with full transparency, SLA guarantees, and AI assistance.
landing.problemSubtitle: Delhi provides hundreds of services, but citizens often struggle to access them or hold agencies accountable.
landing.missingSchemesDesc: Millions of rupees in welfare funds go unused because citizens don't know they qualify or find the application process confusing. Our AI engine matches your profile directly to active schemes.
landing.lostComplaintsDesc: Civic complaints often fall into a black hole with no updates. We enforce strict SLAs (Service Level Agreements) that automatically escalate your issue if not resolved in time.
landing.howItWorksSub: Three simple steps to civic empowerment
landing.step1Desc: Search through active government schemes or chat with our AI to get personalized recommendations based on your profile.
landing.step2Desc: File complaints securely with OTP phone verification. Upload photo proof and let AI route it to the exact right department.
landing.step3Desc: Watch the SLA countdown in real-time. If the officer misses the deadline, the system automatically escalates it to their supervisor.
landing.feat1Desc: Stop guessing. Tell us your age, gender, occupation, and categories, and our rule-engine instantly matches you to schemes you actually qualify for, with plain-language explanations.
landing.feat2Desc: From submission to resolution, every status update is logged with proof. See exactly which officer is handling your case and how much time they have left.
landing.feat3Desc: Speak directly to our bilingual AI assistant to get answers fast. Understand confusing municipal terminology, ask for links, or find out how things work.
landing.rolesSub: A unified platform that connects citizens to the government apparatus.
landing.roleCitizenDesc: Find schemes, file civic complaints instantly, and track progress with total transparency.
landing.roleOfficerDesc: Manage your assigned complaints efficiently, upload photo proofs, and hit SLA targets.
landing.roleSupervisorDesc: Monitor city-wide complaint performance, reassign tasks, and resolve automatic escalations.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to make your voice heard?
landing.ctaSub: Join thousands of Delhi citizens building a better city.

about.title: About NyayaSetu
about.subtitle: A civic tech prototype aimed at bridging the gap between the citizens of Delhi and the municipal services they rely on.
about.problemDesc1: Delhi's municipal apparatus offers hundreds of schemes and services, but the system is often opaque. Citizens face two major challenges:
about.problemLi1: Scheme Information Asymmetry: Welfare funds go unutilized because the people who need them most don't know they exist or don't know if they qualify.
about.problemLi2: The Complaint Black Hole: Reporting a pothole or a broken streetlight often feels like shouting into the void. Without strict deadlines or transparency, complaints are easily ignored.
about.solutionDesc1: NyayaSetu ("Bridge of Justice") tackles these issues directly through a dual-engine platform:
about.solution1Desc: Instead of making citizens search for schemes, our rule-based engine matches citizen profiles (age, gender, category, occupation) against active schemes, telling them exactly why they qualify.
about.solution2Desc: Every submitted complaint comes with a strict Service Level Agreement (SLA) countdown. If an officer doesn't resolve a water leak in 48 hours, the system automatically escalates it to their supervisor. No manual intervention needed.
about.techDesc: NyayaSetu is built on a modern, robust tech stack designed for speed and reliability:
about.disclaimer: Disclaimer: NyayaSetu is a civic tech prototype developed to demonstrate how modern technology can improve municipal services. It is not an official portal of the Government of NCT of Delhi or the Municipal Corporation of Delhi (MCD).

footer.desc: Your bridge to Delhi's civic services. Discover government schemes you qualify for, and file civic complaints with full transparency and accountability.
footer.builtFor: Built with ❤️ for the citizens of Delhi
footer.disclaimer: Disclaimer: NyayaSetu is a civic tech prototype. Not an official government portal.
